CheckTitle: Detect service principals with privileged directory role assignments
Description: Identifies service principals (applications) that hold privileged directory roles such as Global Administrator or Application Administrator.
Risk: Service principals with directory roles can perform administrative actions without user interaction. A compromised app credential with Global Admin role gives an attacker complete tenant control.

Remediation.Recommendation: Replace directory role assignments with scoped application permissions. Use least-privilege API permissions instead of broad directory roles.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
